title: After the Japanese Oaks: The Oaken Flower Is...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The 2,400-meter Japanese Oaks is an extremely
difficult race for me. It leaves me completely
drained...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The original plan was for me to run in the Shuka
Sho next, but Trainer tells me there's another race
I'd shine brighter at.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We'll be tackling the G1 Sprinters Stakes. This
change means I'm going to be running against
senior-year racers!
